summary: Iteration 12 - Brand Partner Portal Redesign Testing Complete. All 17 backend tests passed. All frontend features tested and working: Dashboard tab with stat cards, Brand Profile 3-step wizard (Brand Info, Logo & Media, Targeting), Products CRUD, Campaigns tab, Budget tab with topup, Impressions tab, Onboarding prompt. Brand partner 'testbrand@test.com' account is pending admin approval (expected behavior).
critical_code_review_comments: Brand portal endpoints correctly auto-create brand when none exists
Logo upload validates file types (PNG, JPG, WebP, SVG) and max 10MB size
Products are stored as nested array in brand document (not separate collection)
Target regions model correctly includes country, state, city, zip_code
Onboarding prompt shows when brand.onboarding_completed is false
Campaign creation correctly blocked when brand not approved (returns 403 with 'pending approval' message)
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Test products prefixed with TEST_ are cleaned up after test run
context_for_next_testing_agent: Brand portal redesign is fully functional. Brand partner 'testbrand@test.com' exists with: problem_statement='We help children learn to read through interactive stories', target_regions (US-California-LA, UK-London), target_languages (English, Spanish), target_categories (education, technology). Logo is uploaded. Brand is NOT approved yet. Campaign creation is blocked until admin approves the brand.

frontend_ui_tests: Landing page loads correctly with Brand Partners button - PASSED
Brand partner login redirects to /brand-portal - PASSED
Dashboard tab renders with stat cards (Impressions, Spent, Budget Left, Active Campaigns) - PASSED
Brand overview displays brand name, website, problem statement, products, target regions - PASSED
Brand Profile tab - Step 1 (Brand Info) with name, website, problem_statement, categories - PASSED
Brand Profile tab - Step 2 (Logo & Media) with upload functionality - PASSED
Brand Profile tab - Step 3 (Targeting) with languages and regions - PASSED
Products tab - Add product form with name, description, category fields - PASSED
Campaigns tab - Campaign creation form with categories, budget, CPI - PASSED
Budget tab - Topup options ($25, $50, $100, $250, custom) with Stripe - PASSED
Impressions tab - Stats and recent impressions table - PASSED
Onboarding prompt shows when onboarding_completed=false - PASSED
Click 'Get Started' navigates to Brand Profile tab - PASSED

brand_portal_tabs.dashboard: PASSED - Stats cards and brand overview render correctly
brand_portal_tabs.brand_profile: PASSED - 3-step wizard (Brand Info, Logo & Media, Targeting) works
brand_portal_tabs.products: PASSED - CRUD operations for products work correctly
brand_portal_tabs.campaigns: PASSED - Campaign form renders, creation blocked for unapproved brands
brand_portal_tabs.budget: PASSED - Topup options with Stripe integration
brand_portal_tabs.impressions: PASSED - Stats and recent impressions display

api_endpoints.GET /api/brand-portal/profile: PASSED - Returns user and brand info, auto-creates if none
api_endpoints.PUT /api/brand-portal/profile: PASSED - Updates brand fields including target_regions
